goal: Implement admin routes and run final build verification
summary: Phase 4 completed: created admin layout with sidebar navigation and auth gating in src/routes/admin.tsx, plus 12 admin route files under src/routes/admin/ covering dashboard, proposals, actions, claims, flags, policy, users, reports, datasets, settings, partnerships, and contact queues. Production build verified with `pnpm run build` exiting 0. End-to-end smoke test script `scripts/verify-frontend.sh` started the dev server and confirmed 8 key routes (/, /research, /forum, /actions, /policy, /auth/login, /auth/signup, /admin) all respond HTTP 200 without runtime errors after fixing Node 20 compatibility issues.
stepSummaries:
1. Create admin layout and route files for all 12 admin screens. [verified]
  2. Run final production build to confirm zero errors. [verified]
  3. Run end-to-end smoke test script to verify key routes respond on dev server. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: npx tsc --noEmit and npx vite build passed after admin routes creation. Step 2: pnpm run build exited 0 with 307 client modules. Step 3: Smoke test script executed, all 8 routes returned HTTP 200.
gateVerdicts.rationale: All three steps used real verification. File creation was followed by compilation and build tests; the smoke test exercised the actual dev server with curl.

gateVerdicts.evidence: 12 admin route files exist in src/routes/admin/ plus src/routes/admin.tsx layout. Build produces dist/client and dist/server. Smoke test confirms HTTP 200 on public, auth, and admin routes.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Combined outputs directly deliver the phase goal: admin routes implemented, production build passes, and live server confirms routes render without runtime errors.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Nothing deferred within this phase. All planned admin routes, build verification, and smoke tests are complete.
gateVerdicts.rationale: All step goals met; no left-over items.
